requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection and Electricity Business — Electricity Business Act (電気事業法) and Utility Interconnection Rules
requirement_topic.zh: 电网接入与电力事业——电气事业法及电力公司并网规则
requirement_topic.zht: 電網接入與電力事業——電氣事業法及電力公司並網規則

summary.en: In Japan, the installation and grid connection of EV charging equipment is regulated primarily under the Electricity Business Act (電気事業法, Law No. 170 of 1964, as amended), which governs the supply of electrical energy, safety of electrical installations, and interconnection with the utility grid. EV charging stations — particularly DC fast chargers drawing significant power from the grid — must comply with METI's technical standards for electrical equipment safety (技術基準 — Ministerial Ordinance for Technical Standards Relating to Electrical Facilities, ordinance No. 52/1997 as amended) and the utility's individual interconnection rules (系統連系技術要件ガイドライン, Grid Interconnection Technical Requirements Guidelines, METI). For high-power DC chargers connecting to medium- or high-voltage feeders, separate interconnection applications to the regional transmission operator (e.g., TEPCO, Kansai Electric) are required. Japan's grid voltage is 100 V / 200 V single-phase (residential) and 200 V / 400 V three-phase (commercial), distinct from China's 220 V / 380 V system. Grid frequency is 50 Hz (east Japan) and 60 Hz (west Japan), requiring frequency-adaptive designs.
summary.zh: 在日本，电动汽车充电设备的安装及电网接入主要依据《电气事业法》（Law No. 170/1964，历经多次修订）进行监管，该法律规范电力供应、电气安装安全及与电力公司电网的并网。充电站（尤其是从电网大量取电的直流快充站）须符合经济产业省的电气设备安全技术基准（电气设施技术基准——经济产业省令第52号/1997年，历经修订）及电力公司各自的并网规则（系统连系技术要件指南，METI）。接入中压或高压馈电线路的大功率直流充电站，须向区域输电运营商（如东京电力、关西电力）单独提交并网申请。日本电网电压为100V/200V单相（住宅用）和200V/400V三相（商业用），与中国的220V/380V系统存在差异。电网频率为50Hz（日本东部）和60Hz（日本西部），设计须具备频率适应性。
summary.zht: 在日本，電動汽車充電設備的安裝及電網接入主要依據《電氣事業法》（Law No. 170/1964，歷經多次修訂）進行監管，該法律規範電力供應、電氣安裝安全及與電力公司電網的並網。充電站（尤其是從電網大量取電的直流快充站）須符合經濟產業省的電氣設備安全技術基準（電氣設施技術基準——經濟產業省令第52號/1997年，歷經修訂）及電力公司各自的並網規則（系統連系技術要件指南，METI）。接入中壓或高壓饋電線路的大功率直流充電站，須向區域輸電運營商（如東京電力、關西電力）單獨提交並網申請。日本電網電壓為100V/200V單相（住宅用）和200V/400V三相（商業用），與中國的220V/380V系統存在差異。電網頻率為50Hz（日本東部）和60Hz（日本西部），設計須具備頻率適應性。

standards_or_laws: 電気事業法 (Electricity Business Act) — Law No. 170 of 1964, as amended (METI jurisdiction; governs electrical installations and grid connection)
電気設備に関する技術基準を定める省令 (Ministerial Ordinance for Technical Standards Relating to Electrical Facilities) — Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry Ordinance No. 52/1997, as amended
系統連系技術要件ガイドライン (Grid Interconnection Technical Requirements Guidelines) — METI (requirements for connecting power equipment to the utility grid)

summary.en: China regulates EV charger grid connection through the Electricity Law (电力法, 1996 as amended), MIIT and NDRC guidelines, and the grid company technical standards issued by State Grid Corporation (国家电网) or China Southern Power Grid (南方电网). Key standards include GB/T 29781 (EV charging station technical requirements) and the State Grid Q/GDW series for charger grid interconnection (e.g., Q/GDW 1519-2014: Technical specification of communication between electric vehicle charging station and management system). Grid voltage in China is 220 V / 380 V; frequency is uniformly 50 Hz nationwide. Chinese grid connection approvals and test documentation are not recognised by Japanese utilities.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备的电网接入通过《电力法》（1996年，历经修订）、工信部及国家发展改革委相关指引，以及国家电网公司或中国南方电网公司发布的电网技术标准进行监管。主要标准包括GB/T 29781（电动汽车充电站技术要求）和国家电网Q/GDW系列充电设备并网互联标准（如Q/GDW 1519-2014：电动汽车充电站与管理系统间通信技术规范）。中国电网电压为220V/380V，全国统一频率为50Hz。中国电网接入审批及检测文件不被日本电力公司认可。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備的電網接入通過《電力法》（1996年，歷經修訂）、工信部及國家發展改革委相關指引，以及國家電網公司或中國南方電網公司發佈的電網技術標準進行監管。主要標準包括GB/T 29781（電動汽車充電站技術要求）和國家電網Q/GDW系列充電設備並網互聯標準（如Q/GDW 1519-2014：電動汽車充電站與管理系統間通訊技術規範）。中國電網電壓為220V/380V，全國統一頻率為50Hz。中國電網接入審批及檢測文件不被日本電力公司認可。

standards_or_laws: 电力法 (Electricity Law of the People's Republic of China, 1996, as amended) — governs power supply and grid connection in China
GB/T 29781-2013 — Technical requirements for electric vehicle charging station (China; grid interface and installation requirements for EVSE)
Q/GDW 1519-2014 — Technical specification of communication between electric vehicle charging station and management system (State Grid Corporation of China)

gap.en: Four principal gaps exist: (1) Voltage and frequency — Japan uses 100/200 V single-phase and 200/400 V three-phase (50 Hz east, 60 Hz west), while Chinese EVSE is designed for 220/380 V at 50 Hz uniformly; hardware adaptation of AC input stages and frequency-tolerance verification are required; (2) Regulatory approval pathway — grid connection in Japan requires separate application to the local regional transmission operator under the Electricity Business Act and METI Grid Interconnection Guidelines; Chinese grid approval documentation does not transfer; (3) Electrical installation permits — installation of EV charging infrastructure in Japan requires a licensed electrical construction contractor (電気工事士 — Electrician's qualification) under the Electrical Construction Business Act (電気工事業の業務の適正化に関する法律); Chinese installer qualifications are not recognised; (4) Harmonic/power-quality requirements — Japan's utilities impose power factor and harmonic current limits at the grid connection point; Chinese chargers must be tested and verified to meet Japanese utility power quality standards. [Uncertain: Specific numerical harmonic limits per utility — verify with regional utility interconnection guidelines before installation.]
gap.zh: 存在四项主要差距：（1）电压与频率——日本采用100/200V单相和200/400V三相（东部50Hz，西部60Hz），而中国EVSE统一设计为220/380V/50Hz；须对交流输入级进行硬件适配并验证频率容差；（2）监管审批路径——日本电网接入须依据《电气事业法》及METI系统连系技术要件指南，向当地区域输电运营商单独提交申请；中国电网审批文件无法转用；（3）电气安装许可——日本电动汽车充电基础设施的安装须依据《电气工事业の业务の适正化に关する法律》（电气工程行业法）聘用持证电气工程施工承包商（电气工事士）；中国安装资质不被认可；（4）谐波/电能质量要求——日本电力公司对电网接入点的功率因数及谐波电流设有限值；中国充电设备须经检测并验证符合日本电力公司电能质量标准。【不确定事项：各电力公司具体谐波限值数值——安装前请向区域电力公司并网指引核实。】
gap.zht: 存在四項主要差距：（1）電壓與頻率——日本採用100/200V單相和200/400V三相（東部50Hz，西部60Hz），而中國EVSE統一設計為220/380V/50Hz；須對交流輸入級進行硬件適配並驗證頻率容差；（2）監管審批路徑——日本電網接入須依據《電氣事業法》及METI系統連系技術要件指南，向當地區域輸電運營商單獨提交申請；中國電網審批文件無法轉用；（3）電氣安裝許可——日本電動汽車充電基礎設施的安裝須依據《電氣工事業の業務の適正化に關する法律》（電氣工程行業法）聘用持證電氣工程施工承包商（電氣工事士）；中國安裝資質不被認可；（4）諧波/電能質量要求——日本電力公司對電網接入點的功率因數及諧波電流設有限值；中國充電設備須經檢測並驗證符合日本電力公司電能質量標準。【不確定事項：各電力公司具體諧波限值數值——安裝前請向區域電力公司並網指引核實。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid connection of EV charging equipment in Japan is regulated under the Electricity Business Act and requires compliance with METI technical standards and regional utility interconnection procedures; installation requires licensed electrical contractor
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — grid connection under Electricity Law and State Grid / Southern Grid technical standards; CCC mandatory from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Grid connection of EV charging equipment in Japan requires compliance with the Electricity Business Act, METI technical standards, and regional utility interconnection rules. Hardware adaptation for Japan's 100/200 V grid voltage and dual-frequency (50/60 Hz) requirement is mandatory. Chinese EVSE grid approval documentation does not transfer to Japan. A Japanese-licensed electrical contractor must perform the installation. This comparison is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】在日本进行电动汽车充电设备的电网接入须符合《电气事业法》、METI技术基准及区域电力公司并网规则。针对日本100/200V电网电压及双频率（50/60Hz）要求进行硬件适配为强制要求。中国EVSE电网审批文件在日本不适用。安装须由持有日本资质的电气承包商完成。本比较仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】在日本進行電動汽車充電設備的電網接入須符合《電氣事業法》、METI技術基準及區域電力公司並網規則。針對日本100/200V電網電壓及雙頻率（50/60Hz）要求進行硬件適配為強制要求。中國EVSE電網審批文件在日本不適用。安裝須由持有日本資質的電氣承包商完成。本比較僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。
